dispositions.rationale: False positive. ollamaGenerate intentionally THROWS on unreachable backend, HTTP error (src/reviewers/ollama.js line 70) and timeout (line 68), as documented in its JSDoc (line 41). Its only caller, planWorkOrder (src/cli/plan.js lines 153-158), wraps the call in try/catch and degrades gracefully to the offline template (usedAi=false) on any failure. So errors/timeouts ARE handled by the caller. Proven by test 'planWorkOrder (offline, --no-ai) writes a valid draft WO'. The DeepSeek (deepseek-coder:1.3b) reviewer did not see the caller's try/catch. Verified by the Execution Lead.

notes: qwen (qwen3:8b) degraded on this L2 review (Ollama timeout on the 8-file delta, even at AIEP_OLLAMA_NUM_PREDICT=220). Documented disposition per the Review Execution policy (CPU backend latency, not a defect). DeepSeek completed; the change is covered by 5 new unit tests (31 total passing).
